case_title: DNF ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. JAIME DEVIZCARRA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DNF ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DEVIZCARRA, JAIME , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-25-2020

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $318.42 (TRANSACTION ID # 66538355) AS TO DEFENDANT DEVIZCARRA, JAIME , AN INDIVIDUAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DNF ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEVIZCARRA, JAIME , AN INDIVIDUAL $4,771.09 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,520.21 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,251.30, SEE SCANNED DOC
